title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still getting 'Invalid Credentials' error.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive on Safari.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it but the system still displays the old one on generated PDFs.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago for order #5543 but has not received the amount in their bank yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number. Verified carrier settings, but no luck.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture (PNG, 2MB) but gets 'Upload failed' error every time.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Error
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled in the settings panel.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though payment succeeded and order shows in history.

title: API Integration Timeout
description: Developer reporting frequent 504 Gateway Timeout errors when calling the /v1/sync endpoint.

title: Dark Mode Toggle Missing
description: After the latest update, the dark mode option has disappeared from the display settings menu.

title: Duplicate Billing Charges
description: Customer was charged twice for the monthly Pro plan. Needs immediate reversal of the second transaction.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: The main analytics dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load for users with large datasets.

title: Bulk Export Not Working
description: Trying to export 500+ records to CSV results in a network error halfway through the process.
